title: Establish append-only issue records for the wizard plan
outOfScope: Changing historical issue records or archived Work Item evidence
Implementing the lightweight verification engine or wizard runtime
Changing the Work Item branch/PR/merge/closure policy
Changing any complexity metric other than the bounded Python line ceiling needed by this validator

sources.reason: Work Item boundary and verification contract.
Issue record schema and user-review overview requirements.
Serial Work Item lifecycle and issue-log Work Item boundary.
Measured Python line ceiling reached while adding the validator.

riskAssessment.reason: The Work Item adds a local validator and tests for the issue document; it does not change runtime or historical evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The prior plan-amendment Work Item is merged and closed; the user authorized serial execution of this Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Verify schema validation, append-only record boundaries, secret redaction, commit binding, and final user-review wording.
rawUserRequest: 用户已授权按修订计划串行执行。现在执行前置工单问题记录 Work Item：建立结构化、append-only 的问题记录校验，并在每个后续工单中引用问题记录；本工单完成自身 Contract、测试、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和分支清理后，才进入下一个工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Make the wizard plan issue log machine-checkable without rewriting history.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A valid issue record passes required fields and allowed severity/status values
scenarioCoverage.reason: The required fields and allowed values are defined by the issue-log document and will be enforced by the validator tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Missing evidence, unredacted secret-like values, or invalid append-only transitions are rejected
scenarioCoverage.reason: The document requires evidence links, redaction, and append-only behavior; focused tests provide executable enforcement.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Final issue overview remains a user-review document and historical records are not rewritten
scenarioCoverage.reason: The plan assigns final issue overview review to the user and the issue document states that historical records are not rewritten.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: scripts/ai_issue_log.py validates the required issue record fields, allowed enums, evidence references, and secret-like value rejection.
The validator rejects invalid append-only transitions and accepts a resolved record with resolution evidence.
tests/test_issue_log.py covers valid records, missing evidence, secret rejection, invalid transitions, and final overview references.
The issue-log document and execution plan describe the validator, per-Work-Item append/reference cadence, and final user-review overview.
Historical archive and evidence files are unchanged, the bounded Python budget is recorded, and no wizard or verification-runtime implementation is included.
guidelines: Keep issue evidence append-only and never rewrite historical records.
Reject secret-like values before persisting issue records.
Keep the validator standard-library-only and expose a documented CLI.
Record bounded complexity budget changes with evidence; do not add a repayment record for this validator.

intent.problem: The plan has a documented issue log, but no executable validator ensures issue records remain structured, evidence-bound, append-only, and free of sensitive values.
constraints: Do not rewrite historical archive/evidence or alter prior issue records.
Use Python standard library only and keep the command deterministic.
Reject invalid records and sensitive values rather than silently normalizing them.
Keep final issue overview as a human-review document, not an automatic completion claim.
intent.rationale: A small validator makes the issue-document contract testable before later implementation Work Items append records, reducing the chance that warnings or blockers disappear into prose.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the serial issue-log Work Item and its governed evidence/test changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: The validator and its tests add measured Python lines; reserve a bounded 41150 ceiling without changing other complexity metrics or adding a repayment record.
